name: part_008
file: tmp_hololive English -Promise- 2nd Anniversary Concert： Promise 2 You 【#Promise2U】 [9hMVpcDYS-0]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_008.webm

scenes.description: Kronii prepares for her Karaoke Battle performance while receiving a foot massage.
Kronii's score is revealed, and IRyS prepares for her performance.
IRyS's score is revealed, and the members conclude the segment.

subtitles.original: I'm gonna sing Usseewa!
subtitles.english: I'm gonna sing Usseewa!

subtitles.original: All righty, please get ready. 滝田様、またよろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: All righty, please get ready. Mr. Takita, please take care of us again.

subtitles.original: お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please!

subtitles.original: ガチ痛い！ガチ痛い！
subtitles.english: It really hurts! It really hurts!

subtitles.original: You're done, you're done, you don't have to worry.
subtitles.english: You're done, you're done, you don't have to worry.

subtitles.original: Yay!
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: Okay then, let's go! じゃあ、ミュージック、スタート！
subtitles.english: Okay then, let's go! All right, music, start!

subtitles.original: 思い切りやっちゃって！
subtitles.english: Go all out!

subtitles.original: 正しさとは 愚かさとは
subtitles.english: What is right? What is foolishness?

subtitles.original: それが何か見せつけてやる
subtitles.english: I'll show you exactly what they are

subtitles.original: ちっちゃな頃から優等生
subtitles.english: I've been a model student since I was small

subtitles.original: 気づいたら大人になっていた
subtitles.english: Before I knew it, I'd become an adult

subtitles.original: ナイフの様な思考回路
subtitles.english: With a mind like a knife

subtitles.original: 持ち合わせる訳もなく
subtitles.english: I didn't have the means to use it

subtitles.original: でも遊び足りない 何か足りない
subtitles.english: But I haven't played enough, something's missing

subtitles.original: 困っちまうこれは誰かのせい
subtitles.english: It's a problem, and it's someone's fault

subtitles.original: あてもなくただ混乱するエイデイ
subtitles.english: Just aimlessly confused every day

subtitles.original: それもそっか 最新の流行は当然の把握
subtitles.english: I guess so. Of course, I'm on top of the latest trends

subtitles.original: 経済の動向も通勤時チェック
subtitles.english: Checking economic trends during my commute too

subtitles.original: 純情な精神で入社しワーク
subtitles.english: Joining the company with a pure spirit and working

subtitles.original: 社会人じゃ当然のルールです
subtitles.english: It's a natural rule for a member of society

subtitles.original: はぁ？
subtitles.english: Ha?

subtitles.original: うっせぇうっせぇうっせぇわ
subtitles.english: Shut up, shut up, shut up!

subtitles.original: あなたが思うより健康です
subtitles.english: I'm healthier than you think

subtitles.original: 一切合切凡庸な
subtitles.english: Everything is just mediocre

subtitles.original: あなたじゃ分からないかもね
subtitles.english: You might not understand

subtitles.original: 嗚呼よく似合う その可もなく不可もないメロディー
subtitles.english: Ah, it suits you well, that melody that's neither good nor bad

subtitles.original: うっせぇうっせぇうっせぇわ
subtitles.english: Shut up, shut up, shut up!

subtitles.original: 頭の出来が違うので問題はナシ
subtitles.english: Our brains are built differently, so no problem

subtitles.original: すごい！ Wow! Yay!
subtitles.english: Amazing! Wow! Yay!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: It felt like you were in a massage.
subtitles.english: It felt like you were in a massage.

subtitles.original: Yeah, I feel so good! Yay!
subtitles.english: Yeah, I feel so good! Yay!

subtitles.original: え、マジ？
subtitles.english: Wait, seriously?

subtitles.original: All righty then, the score's in again. Let's see what you got. 結果をお願いします、ジャジャーン！
subtitles.english: All righty then, the score's in again. Let's see what you got. Result please, jajan!

subtitles.original: 2nd Challenge: 77.994 pts.
subtitles.english: 2nd Challenge: 77.994 pts.

subtitles.original: She got a 77.994, that's literally a 78.
subtitles.english: She got a 77.994, that's literally a 78.

subtitles.original: All right, well, who's left? We only have one person left.
subtitles.english: All right, well, who's left? We only have one person left.

subtitles.original: IRyS先輩！
subtitles.english: IRyS-senpai!

subtitles.original: 行きなさい、早く。
subtitles.english: Go on, hurry up.

subtitles.original: What song are you singing?
subtitles.english: What song are you singing?

subtitles.original: I am going to be singing Akuma no Ko because the world is just that cruel. 世界は残酷です。
subtitles.english: I am going to be singing Akuma no Ko because the world is just that cruel. The world is cruel.

subtitles.original: 先生も本当に思い切りやってください。
subtitles.english: Teacher, please really go all out.

subtitles.original: 優しくしてください。
subtitles.english: Please be gentle.

subtitles.original: 強く、強く。
subtitles.english: Stronger, stronger.

subtitles.original: All right, you ready? I'm scared.
subtitles.english: All right, you ready? I'm scared.

subtitles.original: Yes, じゃあ、ミュージック、スタート！
subtitles.english: Yes, all right, music, start!

subtitles.original: 鉄の弾が正義の証明
subtitles.english: Iron bullets are the proof of justice

subtitles.original: 貫けば英雄に近づいた
subtitles.english: If they pierce through, I'm closer to being a hero

subtitles.original: その目を閉じて触れてみれば
subtitles.english: If you close your eyes and try to touch

subtitles.original: 同じ形 同じ体温の悪魔
subtitles.english: A devil of the same shape and body temperature

subtitles.original: 僕はダメで あいつはいいの？
subtitles.english: I'm no good, but they are?

subtitles.original: そこに壁があっただけなのに
subtitles.english: Even though there was just a wall there

subtitles.original: 生まれてしまった運命嘆くな
subtitles.english: Don't lament the fate of being born

subtitles.original: 僕らはみんな自由なんだから
subtitles.english: Because we are all free

subtitles.original: 鳥のように羽があれば
subtitles.english: If I had wings like a bird

subtitles.original: どこへだって行けるけど
subtitles.english: I could go anywhere

subtitles.original: 帰る場所がなければ
subtitles.english: But if I have no place to return to

subtitles.original: きっとどこへも行けない
subtitles.english: I surely can't go anywhere

subtitles.original: ただただ生きるのは嫌だ
subtitles.english: I hate just living aimlessly

subtitles.original: 世界は残酷だ
subtitles.english: The world is cruel

subtitles.original: それでも君を愛すよ
subtitles.english: Even so, I will love you

subtitles.original: なにを犠牲にしても
subtitles.english: No matter what I sacrifice

subtitles.original: それでも君を守るよ
subtitles.english: Even so, I will protect you

subtitles.original: 間違いだとしても
subtitles.english: Even if it's a mistake

subtitles.original: 疑ったりしない
subtitles.english: I won't doubt it

subtitles.original: 正しさとは自分のこと強く信じることだ
subtitles.english: Righteousness is believing in yourself strongly

subtitles.original: だろう？ How was... how do you feel? Refreshing, right?
subtitles.english: Right? How was... how do you feel? Refreshing, right?

subtitles.original: That was great!
subtitles.english: That was great!

subtitles.original: 素晴らしい体験をさせていただきました。痛っ。
subtitles.english: Thank you for the wonderful experience. Ouch.

subtitles.original: All right, I feel like the scores are in. Shall we see? ジャジャーン！
subtitles.english: All right, I feel like the scores are in. Shall we see? Jajan!

subtitles.original: 2nd Challenge: 77.716 pts.
subtitles.english: 2nd Challenge: 77.716 pts.

subtitles.original: And that concludes the second half!
subtitles.english: And that concludes the second half!

subtitles.original: My big toe still hurts so bad.
subtitles.english: My big toe still hurts so bad.

subtitles.original: Yeah, みんな痛がってます。滝田さん、ありがとうございました。
subtitles.english: Yeah, everyone's in pain. Mr. Takita, thank you very much.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！痛気持ちよかったです。バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! It hurt but it felt good. Bye-bye!
